# Replacement Process

Once a damage report is approved, a replacement ships by expedited shipment at no charge, and the shopper keeps or disposes of the damaged unit rather than returning it. If the same product is out of stock, the shopper may select a reimbursement or wait for the next restock without losing their place.

[Source: damaged_items.md#replacement-process]
